changes.comment: Extend ICryptoProvider.importKeyPairFromSeed to support 'x25519' (SeedDerivableAlgorithm now 'ed25519' | 'x25519'), deriving a deterministic X25519 key-agreement keypair (private 'deriveBits', public no-usage) from a fixed 32-byte seed. This lets a checked-in recipient keypair back a reproducible HpkeProvider seal/open round-trip vector; with a non-extractable private key it composes with openBase's supplied recipient-public-key path.
